caption: In a medical simulation setting, several people wearing scrubs and face masks are gathered around a simulated patient. In the beginning, a person in pink scrubs and yellow gloves is focused on a task near a patient's head, while another person in blue scrubs stands nearby. To the right, a person in black clothing and blue gloves reaches toward a wall-mounted phone and equipment. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts to a close-up of two women; one is in blue scrubs and the other is in a black jacket, both wearing blue face masks. The woman in black appears to be interacting with the wall-mounted phone. The environment contains various medical supplies, including yellow bins and monitoring equipment. The text "Sim Week" appears as a watermark on the bottom right of the frames, accompanied by smaller, less legible text below it.
